message:
feat(messaging): add NATS JetStream client for durable streams

Introduce JetStream support extending the NATS client with persistence
and exactly-once delivery semantics.

New types in jetstream.rs:
- JetStreamContext: JetStream API entry point
- StreamConfig/StreamInfo/StreamState: Stream configuration and status
- ConsumerConfig/Consumer: Pull and push consumer management
- JsMessage: Message with ack/nack/inProgress methods
- PubAck: Publish acknowledgement with sequence and dedup info

Policies:
- AckPolicy: None, All, Explicit
- DeliverPolicy: All, Last, New, ByStartSeq, ByStartTime
- RetentionPolicy: Limits, Interest, WorkQueue
- DiscardPolicy: Old, New
- StorageType: File, Memory

Features:
- Durable message streams with subject filtering
- Pull-based consumers with batching
- Exactly-once delivery via message deduplication
- In-flight message tracking with inProgress()
- Stream and consumer CRUD operations

All operations integrate with Cx for proper cancellation handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
